title: Chess Go
description: A mod that simulates go chess with tables and stones
body:
JEI can be used for recipes.

 

There are some items/blocks added in the mod:

- Chess Tables (With several materials, used to play chess on)

- Chess Containers, used to store and access stones

- Glass Sprays, used to recolour stuff

- Prototypes, just some casual core crafting materials for tables and containers

- Stone Bags, a bag contains loads of stones, can be right - click to get the stones out or fill the stone containers

- Stones, stones you play.

 

These are added in V2.0:

- Classic Chess Tables

- Classic Chess Pieces (King, Queen, Rook, Bishop, Knight, Pawn)

- Classic Chess Set

 

 

 

 

Classic Chess (Added after V2.0)

 

 

 

Different (simpler) stone models can be used by alternating the value in the client config (0 ~ 3 both inclusive, from worst to best)

0 uses 1 cube per stone

1 uses 15 cubes per stone

2 uses 30 cubes per stone

3 uses 45 cubes per stone

 

Different (simpler) piece models can be used by alternating the value in the client config (0 ~ 2 both inclusive, from worst to best)

 

Using lower values/qualities can greatly increases the FPS

 

 

How to craft

You first need to craft empty stones bag or empty chess set depend on what you want, and then hold it in the main hand, ingredient on the off hand, then right click to merge.

Ingredient List

 

Visit the demonstration video for more.
